rules.missing-subtitle: Long-form source attributions must include the report subtitle.
rules.legacy-1800: Legacy '1,800 GCC' figures must not appear as current claims.
rules.legacy-1800-historical: Legacy '1,800 GCC' kept with explicit historical framing.

findings.snippet: "text": "The practical implication: when earlier industry reports said 'there are 1,800 GCCs in India' (FY2024 figure; the FY2026 count is 2,117 across 3,728 units), they are using GCC as the umbrella term. That figure includes centers of all sizes, functions, and maturity stages
